episodes.title: Bond set for 6 suspects arrested for allegedly kidnapping, beating victim over several days
episodes.description: Aaron Bradshaw, 49; Austin Bradshaw, 23; Michael Esqueda, 28; Martina Jones, 28; David Cessna, 26; and Chance Johnston, 27, are charged in the case.

episodes.title: Six people arrested for allegedly kidnapping, beating victim over several days
episodes.description:
Six people in Lucas County were arrested early Saturday morning on kidnapping and assault charges.

Aaron Bradshaw, 49, Austin Bradshaw, 23, Michael Esqueda, 28, Martina Jones, 28, David Cessna, 26, and Chance Johnston, 27, were charged for allegedly assaulting and holding someone against their will for several days.

According to documents WTOL 11 received from Toledo police, the incident started around March 14 and lasted for approximately a week. The documents allege the victim was held against his will and was violently threatened by the defendants.

MORE: https://www.wtol.com/article/news/crime/six-people-arrested-kidnapping-beating-victim-several-days-toledo-police-ohio-crime/512-fa6fc27f-1cc4-4902-9c63-c405597c2838
